name: answerShippingQuery
description: If you sent an invoice requesting a shipping address and the parameter is_flexible was specified, the Bot API will send an Update with a shipping_query field to the bot. Use this method to reply to shipping queries. On success, True

parameters.name: shipping_query_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the query to be answered

parameters.name: ok
parameters.description: Pass True if delivery to the specified address is possible and False if there are any problems (for example, if delivery to the specified address is not possible)

parameters.name: shipping_options
parameters.description: Required if ok is True. A JSON-serialized array of available shipping options.

parameters.name: error_message
parameters.description: Required if ok is False. Error message in human readable form that explains why it is impossible to complete the order (e.g. “Sorry, delivery to your desired address is unavailable”). Telegram will display this message to the user.
